name: Funny Kitty Care
author: Poki
description: Funny Kitty Care is a simulation game where you groom your kitten friends and give them the special treatment they deserve. In this cute makeover game, you find a stray kitten in a trash can. Clean the dirty kitty's coat before giving it a nice lukewarm bath. Scrub its fur and dry it afterwards. Once the cat is freshly cleaned, you can dress it up in all kinds of stylish outfits and accessories. Keep lending a hand to kitties and make many adorable friends along the way! How to play Funny Kitty Care? Click or tap on an item to pick it up, and drag it over the area you want to use it on. Who created Funny Kitty Care? Funny Kitty Care is created by Go Panda Games, an indie developer studio based in South Surabaya, Indonesia. They have many other cute games on Poki: Tictoc KPOP Fashion , Funny Puppy Emergency , Yummy Taco , Funny Cooking Camp , Funny Camping Day , Funny Travelling Airport , Funny Throat Surgery 2 , Yummy Waffle Ice Cream , Cooking Korean Lesson , Funny Pet Haircut , funny-puppy-dressup, funny-kitty-dressup, Funny Nose Surgery , and Hipster vs Rockers How can I play Funny Kitty Care for free? You can play Funny Kitty Care for free on Poki. Can I play Funny Kitty Care on mobile devices and desktop? Funny Kitty Care can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
